sources.title: Gremlin (Full Movie) Horror, Comedy, 2017
sources.description:
Adam receives a mysterious box from a relative containing a creature that will kill everyone he cares about. He can't destroy it. He can't escape it. The only way to be rid of the curse is to give the box to someone he loves….

Directed by Ryan Bellgardt
2017
Starring Adam Hampton, Kristy K. Boone, Catcher Stair, Katie Burgess, Caleb Milby, Michael Page, Connie D. Franklin

Edited for YouTube ad standards

metadata.Plot: Gremlin starts as we meet the Thatcher family, Adam, Julie, Anna, Charlie and grandmother Mary who receive the mysterious box from their Uncle Jim as the family is grieving the loss of their child. When a small creature emerges from the box it starts taking lives, one at a time as Adam must follow the warning of giving it to someone he loves to break the curse put upon his family, but the secrets will come out about what happened to their other child and the personal lives of the family. Can they escape from this curse before it is too late.
metadata.Writer: Ryan Bellgardt, Josh McKamie, Andy Swanson
metadata.Actors: Adam Hampton, Kristy K. Boone, Catcher Stair
